**[STUB]** Created from the Neow KB entry and live game text; verify against a dedicated wiki page if one appears.

## Description

Neow's Torment is an Ancient Relic offered by Neow at the start of a run.

## Notes

### Sources

Neow's Torment: Upon pickup, add 1 Neow's Fury to your Deck.

## Strategy Notes

- Strong conservative Act 1 opener when the map is still hidden: Neow's Fury gives immediate damage and discard recursion without an empty chest or shop-dependent payoff.
